article_title: IO Interactive Holds 007 First Light's Switch 2 Version Back Until Late Summer as PS5, Xbox, and PC Stay on May 27

content_preview.title: IO Interactive Holds 007 First Light's Switch 2 Version Back Until Late Summer as PS5, Xbox, and PC Stay on May 27
content_preview.summary: IO Interactive will ship 007 First Light on PS5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC on May 27, 2026, but the Nintendo Switch 2 version slips to late summer as CEO Hakan Abrak insists on a polished port.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

IO Interactive's 007 First Light will arrive on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC on May 27, 2026, but Nintendo Switch 2 owners will have to wait several more months. The studio confirmed in early April that the Switch 2 version is being held back to "later this summer," according to [Engadget](https://www.engadget.com/gaming/nintendo/the-nintendo-switch-2-version-of-007-first-light-is-delayed-until-later-this-summer-151524487.html), and IO Interactive CEO Hakan Abrak has since...

editor_notes.content_quality: Clean News piece, ~660 words. Tight focus on the new development (CEO interview clarifying the delay rationale) rather than rehashing the original delay announcement.

source_verification.source-0_engadget: Verified: PS5/Xbox Series X-S/PC May 27, Switch 2 'later this summer', March 2026 original release date.
source_verification.source-1_nintendolife_apr: Verified: comparison with Borderlands 4, High On Life 2, Lollipop Chainsaw RePOP, Powerwash Simulator 2 DLC; Hitman World of Assassination 'a fair few problems at launch... since been patched'.
source_verification.source-2_nintendolife_may: Verified verbatim: Abrak quotes 'It's running on the Switch 2. We just want to make sure it's good as it can be. I don't want to hear it wasn't a good version. To be completely honest, we need a bit more time to get it where we want it to be'; 'probably going be late summer'; 'Bond has a special place on Nintendo. And I promise I will do everything I can'.
source_verification.source-3_techradar: Verified: Switch 2 version was originally tracked to May 27 alongside other platforms before being singled out.

editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All quoted material traced verbatim. Abrak quotes attributed correctly to the Nintendo Life interview (originally The Game Business).
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral. Reports the delay without industry-pile-on framing; the Hitman launch reference is contextual rather than judgmental.
editor_notes.originality: No prior 007 First Light coverage in the archive. Fresh story.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: APPROVE. Cryptography, sources, and content all clean.
